title: Create: Additional Recipes
description: A simple Create addon that adds more recipes, making more items automatable.
body:
Here is a list of all the recipes that the mod adds:

*   Mixing Andesite and Nether Wart to make Netherrack.
*   Crushing limestone for a 25% chance of a Copper Nugget and a 5% chance of Sand.
*   Crushing Scoria for a 25% chance of a Zinc Nugget
*   Crafting 4 pieces of Charcoal in a square to make Coal (also works with compacting).
*   Haunting Slimeballs for Magma Cream.
*   Mixing 2 Andesite, 2 Diorite, and 50mb of Lava to produce Tuff.
*   Mixing 2 Sugar and 1 Magma Cream in a heated basin for Gunpowder.
*   Made elytras "craftable"

PLEASE READ: You can use this mod in a published modpack as long as I'm credited.
